name: Cory Booker
stanceSummary: Track AIPAC reports an Israel Lobby Total of $5,818,073 for Cory Booker in U.S. Senate, NJ. This dataset currently classifies this as Pro-Israel when total funding is above $0; additional primary-source statement and vote evidence should continue to be expanded.

timeline.event: Track AIPAC congressional listing records Israel Lobby Total: $5,818,073.
